Extensions.File:
<#
.SYNOPSIS
    Detects Desktop vs Laptop via WMI/CIM, then renames the computer:
    MGE-DeviceType-Last7OfSerial  (e.g., MGE-LT-1234567)
    Runs fully unattended — no prompts, no confirmations, no auto-restart.

.NOTES
    Run as Administrator. Requires a restart (handled separately) to apply the new computer name.
    Designed for RMM/ZTI deployment (NinjaOne, N-central, OSDCloud, etc.)
#>

#region --- Config ---
$CompanyID = "AA"
#endregion

#region --- Get Serial Number FIRST (bail out early if missing) ---
try {
    $serial = (Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_BIOS -ErrorAction Stop).SerialNumber
}
catch {
    throw "No serial number found. Unable to query Win32_BIOS: $($_.Exception.Message)"
}

if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($serial) -or $serial -match '^(To Be Filled By O.E.M.|None|System Serial Number|0+)$') {
    throw "No serial number found. Computer name was NOT changed."
}

$serialSuffix = if ($serial.Length -lt 7) { $serial } else { $serial.Substring($serial.Length - 7) }
#endregion

#region --- Detect Desktop vs Laptop ---
function Get-DeviceType {

    $pcSystemType = (Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_ComputerSystem -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).PCSystemType
    $chassisTypes = (Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_SystemEnclosure -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).ChassisTypes
    $hasBattery   = [bool](Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_Battery -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

    $laptopChassis = @(8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 14, 18, 21, 30, 31, 32)

    $votes = @()

    if ($pcSystemType -eq 2) { $votes += "LT" }
    elseif ($pcSystemType -eq 1) { $votes += "DT" }

    if ($chassisTypes) {
        $match = $chassisTypes | Where-Object { $laptopChassis -contains $_ }
        if ($match) { $votes += "LT" } else { $votes += "DT" }
    }

    if ($hasBattery) { $votes += "LT" }

    if ($votes.Count -eq 0) {
        return $null
    }

    $ltCount = ($votes | Where-Object { $_ -eq "LT" }).Count
    $dtCount = ($votes | Where-Object { $_ -eq "DT" }).Count

    if ($ltCount -ge $dtCount) { return "LT" } else { return "DT" }
}

$deviceType = Get-DeviceType

if (-not $deviceType) {
    Write-Host -ForegroundColor Yellow "WARNING: Could not automatically determine device type. Defaulting to DT (Desktop)."
    $deviceType = "DT"
}

Write-Host -ForegroundColor Green "Detected device type: $deviceType"
#endregion

#region --- Build and Apply New Computer Name ---
$newName = "$CompanyID-$deviceType-$serialSuffix"

if ($newName.Length -gt 15) {
    Write-Host -ForegroundColor Yellow "Warning: '$newName' exceeds 15 characters and may not be NetBIOS-compatible."
}

Write-Host "Current computer name: $env:COMPUTERNAME"
Write-Host "New computer name:     $newName"

try {
    Rename-Computer -NewName $newName -Force -ErrorAction Stop
    Write-Host -ForegroundColor Green "Computer renamed to '$newName' successfully."
    Write-Host -ForegroundColor Cyan "A restart is required for the change to take effect (not performed by this script)."
}
catch {
    throw "Failed to rename computer: $($_.Exception.Message)"
}
#endregion
